pages.text: There are two main types of bait:$(br)$(br)1. $(l)Bugs$(): Gathered using a Bug Net. Simply break grass, vines, or sugar cane with it. The drop chance is quite high.$(br)$(br)2. $(l)Worms$(): Gathered with a shovel. Dig dirt, but keep in mind — the chance of finding a worm is lower.
Bug Net. Its durability and properties are similar to a regular stick, but it's essential for starting out.
